wine_retailers.name: Badie Vins
wine_retailers.description: Founded 1880, Badie is Bordeaux's most venerable independent caviste, stocking over 3,000 references from all appellations including vertical collections of classified growths and en-primeur allocations.
wine_retailers.speciality: Classified Bordeaux, Sauternes, back-vintages and en-primeur pre-order

wine_retailers.name: L'Intendant
wine_retailers.description: Bordeaux's iconic spiral staircase wine tower with 15,000 references across five floors. Specialist in Bordeaux primeur, rare back-vintages, and daily by-the-glass tasting counter in situ.
wine_retailers.speciality: Full range Bordeaux classifications, primeur allocations, Sauternes library

wine_retailers.name: Max Bordeaux
wine_retailers.address: 32 cours du Marechal Joffre, 33000 Bordeaux, France
wine_retailers.description: Chartrons caviste and wine bar hybrid, specialising in Bordeaux appellations plus natural and biodynamic producers from across France. Tasting events and producer evenings weekly.
wine_retailers.speciality: Natural and biodynamic Bordeaux, satellite appellations, by-the-glass tasting counter

wine_retailers.name: Millesima Bordeaux
wine_retailers.description: One of Europe's largest Bordeaux merchants, with 2.5 million bottles in bonded storage; walk-in retail shop and en-primeur allocation service. Specialists in Medoc and Right Bank vertical collections.
wine_retailers.speciality: En-primeur futures, classified growth verticals, international shipping

wine_retailers.name: L'Union de Producteurs de Saint-Emilion
wine_retailers.description: The Saint-Emilion cooperative representing 230 grower-members producing over 13 million bottles annually. Retail shop selling cooperative wines from entry-level Bordeaux to Grand Cru selections at cellar-door prices.
wine_retailers.speciality: Saint-Emilion cooperative wines at producer prices; bulk and case sales

wine_retailers.name: Jefford et Fils
wine_retailers.description: Old-town specialist caviste focused on small-production Bordeaux estates and satellite appellations. Strong in Pessac-Leognan whites, Graves and Cotes de Castillon grower labels.
wine_retailers.speciality: Grower Bordeaux, Pessac-Leognan blancs, Cotes de Castillon and Fronsac
